title: On the enrichment of time series with textual data for forecasting agricultural commodity prices
author: Reis Filho, Marcacini, et al.

steps_raw.title: Methods
steps_raw.instruction: This section presents the proposed method TSED, a representation of time-series combined with features extracted from a vector representation of texts. Fig. 1 illustrates the steps performed in the method.Fig. 1Conceptual Model of the TSED method.Fig. 1
